args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting — Start initial development phase (due 2024-05-20)
args.body:
Hi David,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase. Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please do the following:
1) Schedule a kickoff meeting or otherwise confirm the start date with the development team.
2) Identify the development leads you'll work with and assign owners for the initial tasks.
3) Reply here with the confirmed start date, the dev contacts, and any blockers or resource needs.

Confirm by replying to this email when these steps are complete.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting — Send meeting agenda to John Mitchell (due 2024-05-21)
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is to email the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

Please do the following:
1) Attach meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to the email to john.mitchell@gmail.com.
2) In the message to John, ask for any feedback needed and a target date for his response.
3) Reply here to confirm the message was sent and forward me the sent message or copy of John's reply.

Confirm by replying to this email when the agenda has been sent.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting — Review sales projections (due 2024-05-19)
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is to review the sales projections and provide feedback. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Please do the following:
1) Review the attached (or shared) sales projections document and note specific items that need revision or clarification.
2) Provide concise feedback with suggested changes, priorities, and impact on forecasts.
3) Reply here with your feedback and any recommended next steps.

Confirm by replying to this email when your review is complete.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
